items.title: Amasty patches 25 Magento extensions, 1 critical
items.summary: Sansec reported a massive security release by Amasty for 25 extensions, with at least one critical vulnerability that could lead to remote code execution.

items.title: Unauthenticated file upload in Amasty Order Attributes for Magento
items.summary: Sansec found an unauthenticated arbitrary file upload flaw in Amasty Order Attributes (CVE-2026-53787) that allows attackers to write executable files to a Magento store without logging in, potentially leading to remote code execution.

items.title: Critical vulnerability in Mirasvit Cache Warmer for Magento
items.summary: Sansec discovered an unauthenticated PHP object injection flaw in Mirasvit Cache Warmer, a popular Magento extension, allowing remote code execution via a crafted cookie. This critical vulnerability (CVE-2026-45247) has been actively exploited in the wild.

items.title: Security update available for Adobe Commerce
items.summary: Adobe released a security update addressing critical, important, and moderate vulnerabilities that could lead to arbitrary code execution, arbitrary file system write, application denial-of-service, and security feature bypass.

items.title: PolyShell: unrestricted file upload in Magento and Adobe Commerce
items.summary: Sansec discovered a critical flaw (PolyShell) in Magento's REST API allowing unauthenticated attackers to upload executable files disguised as images, with attacks observed against many stores.

items.title: Security update available for Adobe Commerce
items.summary: Adobe released a security update resolving critical, important, and moderate vulnerabilities that could lead to security feature bypass, application denial-of-service, privilege escalation, arbitrary code execution, and arbitrary file system read.

items.title: Adobe Commerce Auth Bypass Vulnerability
items.summary: An incorrect authorization vulnerability (CWE-863) in Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source allows low-privileged attackers to bypass security features and gain unauthorized view access to data without user interaction.
